title: Semantic Graph Theme
description: Schema for visual themes used when rendering a semantic graph as a Mermaid flowchart. Each theme bundles per-node-type shapes/colors, per-edge-semantic strokes, layout direction, label mode, and optional overrides. Consumed by scripts/graph_to_mermaid.py via load_theme().

name.description: Kebab-case identifier, must match the filename stem (e.g. "role-colored" → role-colored.json).

mode.description: Declares the viewport backdrop this theme is designed for. Consumed by the renderer (Mermaid init theme) and the picker UI (groups themes by mode).

nodeStyles.description: Per-node-type visual styling. Keys are node types from the semantic graph schema; values describe shape + colors.

operatorVariants.description: Optional per-semantic overrides for operator nodes (direct / inverse / neutral flow). Only color + font fields — shape comes from nodeStyles.operator.

edgeStyle.description: Default edge styling applied to every edge. Used when no per-semantic edgeStyles entry matches, or as the flowchart-wide linkStyle default.

edgeStyles.description: Per-semantic edge styling, keyed by the edge's ``semantic`` field (direct / inverse / neutral).

roleStyles.description: Optional per-role color palette (used when the renderer is called with color_by="role"). Keys are semantic roles (state_variable, parameter, constant, coefficient, index, dependent, independent, observable, field). Unknown roles are also allowed for extensibility.

useLinkStyle.description: When true, each edge gets its own per-index linkStyle directive (derived from edgeStyles). When false, a single linkStyle default is emitted from edgeStyle.

fontSize.description: Global font size in pixels. Falls back per nodeStyle when the node's own fontSize is unset.

labelMode.description: How symbol node labels are rendered: emoji prefix, KaTeX-rendered LaTeX, or plain text.

shape.description: Node shape. Classic wrappers (rect/circle/stadium/hexagon/diamond) map to Mermaid's legacy syntax; the rest use Mermaid 11+ typed-shape form.

color.description: CSS color: hex (#rgb/#rrggbb/#rrggbbaa), named (red, steelblue…), keyword (none, transparent, currentColor), or rgb()/rgba()/hsl()/hsla() function.

arrow.description: Mermaid edge arrow syntax. Solid (-->/---), thick (==>/===), or dotted (-.->/-.-).
